name: elasticsearch-7-10-0
description: OctoBus package for Elasticsearch 7.10.0 read-only cluster operations (cluster health, indices, search, nodes).

Elasticsearch_7_10_0.Elasticsearch_7_10_.name: search-documents
Elasticsearch_7_10_0.Elasticsearch_7_10_.description: Search documents in an Elasticsearch index.

Elasticsearch_7_10_0.Elasticsearch_7_10_.name: list-nodes
Elasticsearch_7_10_0.Elasticsearch_7_10_.description: List Elasticsearch cluster nodes (cat nodes JSON).
